matches.x: 1 DEAR and well-beloved brother, Brigham Young, verily thus saith the Lord unto you: My servant Brigham, it is no more required at your hand to leave your family as in times past, for your offering is acceptable to me.

586
coming forth of the Book of Mormon, first printed in Edinburgh.
Friday, 9th.
Revelation given to Joseph Smith, in tho house of Brigham Young, in Nnuvoo City, July 9, 18*11—
Dear and well-beloved brother Brigham Young, verily thus saith the Lord unto you, my servant Brigham, it is no more required at your hand to leave your family as in times past, for your offering is acceptable to me ; I…
